content: Standard PG hybrid search: GIN index on tsvector + HNSW on vector, two subqueries merged with Reciprocal Rank Fusion score=sum(1/(60+rank)); candidate pool k=50 per retriever default; websearch_to_tsquery/plainto_tsquery for user input. Pure vector ~62% precision vs 84%+ hybrid in cited benchmarks. All doable in one SQL query, no Elasticsearch needed at pilot scale.
